1.premise: Hell is imagined as segregated into stereotype-specific punishments.
Adding race to hell makes a generic insult personally alarming.

2.premise: The devil being evil implies hell would also be segregated.

3.premise: Black hell is endless paternity drama and child-support expense.

4.premise: Gay hell maps top and bottom onto literal levels of hell.

5.premise: Japanese suffering can be Vietnamese joy because enemies value opposite outcomes.

6.premise: Mexican hell freezing over turns ice into ICE.

7.premise: Indian hell is assumed to smell worse than ordinary hell.

lines.text: I was talking to my black friend the other day on the phone,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and he was ignoring me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He was really pissing me off, so I was like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "You know what, man? Fuck you.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Go to hell. You know what? Go to black hell."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That got his attention.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yeah, he turned around real quick.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yo, black hell is crazy, bro.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Is it? You guys think hell's not segregated?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's run by the fucking devil.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Like the most evil guy of all time.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: What do you think black hell would be like?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Just more every day finding out you are the father forever?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Baby's name is Smoke Detector.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Always needs batteries, you know?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: There's gay hell.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: There's two levels of gay hell.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: There's top end.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Bottom. Hell yeah.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Not homophobic.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I just hate people that love to gossip.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Japanese hell would just be Vietnamese heaven.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I don't know.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I think Mexican hell is actually froze over right now
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because of all the ice.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'm just really glad I don't have to go to Indian hell.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Can you imagine how bad that place fucking smells?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Holy shit. Thank you so much, guys.
lines.label: fluff
